articles.author: Eva Van Dam
articles.title: European troops and warplanes join Paris Bastille Day parade in a show of unity for Ukraine - AP News
articles.description: This year’s Bastille Day celebrations in France focus on European unity and support for Ukraine. Troops and warplanes from across Europe are joining Tuesday's parade in Paris. President Emmanuel Macron is hosting around 30 leaders, aiming to show unity and st…
articles.content: PARIS (AP) Ukrainian fighter pilots and troops took pride of place in Frances national Bastille Day celebrations Tuesday as a massive parade showcased support for Ukraine and symbolically flexed Euro… [+5784 chars]
